description: Generations are completing but the critic has caught nothing across the window. Historically the catch rate is well above zero, so a flatline means the critic is silently broken (bad JSON, wrong model, prompt regression), not that generated code became perfect.

A.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AS ts, sum(attributes_number['devswarm.generation.critic_catches']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName='devswarm' AND name='generation' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts HAVING count() > 0 ORDER BY ts
